channel.title: Google-Photos on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Google-Photos on Arrans github.io

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
item.description: Script that organizes the Google Takeout archive into one big chronological folder

item.title: photoprism/photoprism
item.description: AI-Powered Photos App for the Decentralized Web 🌈💎✨

item.title: arran4/send-to-google-photos
item.description: A desktop utility to help easily upload files to google photos from what ever shell
